mapper.select: select g.*, c.category_name from goods g left join goods_category c on g.category_id=c.category_id where g.status=1 order by g.goods_id desc
select g.*, c.category_name from goods g left join goods_category c on g.category_id=c.category_id where g.goods_id=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into goods (goods_code, goods_name, category_id, specification, unit, price, status) values (#{goodsCode}, #{goodsName}, #{categoryId}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{price}, 1)
mapper.update: update goods set goods_name=#{goodsName}, category_id=#{categoryId}, specification=#{specification}, unit=#{unit}, price=#{price}, status=#{status}, update_time=now() where goods_id=#{goodsId}
mapper.delete: update goods set status=0, goods_code=concat(goods_code, '_deleted_', goods_id), update_time=now() where goods_id=#{id}
